scripts.build: npm run build:editor && npm run build:pdf
scripts.build:pdf: rm -rf static/pdfjs && mkdir -p static/pdfjs && cp node_modules/pdfjs-dist/legacy/build/pdf.worker.mjs static/pdfjs/pdf.worker.mjs && cp node_modules/pdfjs-dist/LICENSE static/pdfjs/LICENSE && cp -R node_modules/pdfjs-dist/cmaps static/pdfjs/cmaps && cp -R node_modules/pdfjs-dist/standard_fonts static/pdfjs/standard_fonts && esbuild frontend/pdf/main.js --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2020 --minify --outfile=static/js/pdf-preview.js
